summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that MTD is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $1301.36. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 53.8%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $1421.98 and a significant trendline confluence around $1363.64 (formed by 11 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
